---
title: "Matteo Ventura"
image: me2.jpg 
toc: false
# Questo rimuove le barre laterali vuote e allarga l'area del testo
page-layout: full 
about:
  template: solana # Sfrutta meglio la larghezza rispetto a trestles
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/MatteoVentura
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/matteo-ventura-770037171/
    - icon: google
      text: Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=aRhtf3kAAAAJ&hl=en
    # - icon: mortarboard-fill
    #   text: University
    #   href: https://www.unibs.it/en/ugov/person/145546
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: CV
      href: CV_VENTURA_ENG.pdf
---


I am a **Post-doc in Statistics** at the University of Calabria. 
My methodological research focuses on Mixture Models for ordinal, with applications in sensory analysis, consumer behavior, and psychology.


## Research Interests

* **Mixture Models for Ordinal Data:** Development and extension of the CUB (Combination of Uniform and Binomial) model class to measure latent components such as feeling and uncertainty. My work includes methodological advancements applied to diverse fields such as sensory analysis, sports analytics, and consumer experience.

* **Model-Based Clustering & Mixture Models:** Design and implementation of clustering algorithms for multivariate rating data. My research aims at developing computationally efficient methods that accurately account for the dependence structure among variables.

* **Graphical Models with Applications in Ecology:** Application of Gaussian Graphical Models to study belowground biodiversity and the structure of soil arthropod communities in agroecosystems. The goal is to provide statistical tools to support environmental management and decision-making.

## Education & Visiting

**Visiting Researcher** | Sep. 2025 – Oct. 2025   
*Victoria University of Wellington, New Zealand*   
Supervisors: Prof. Ivy Liu and Richard Arnold 



**PhD in Analytics for Economics and Management** | 2021 - 2024  
*University of Brescia, Italy* Thesis title: *Advances in Mixture Models for Ordinal Data: Theoretical Insights and Model-based Clustering*<br>
Supervisor: Prof. Paola Zuccolotto | Co-supervisor: Prof. Julien Jacques

**Visiting PhD student** | Sep. 2023 - Jun. 2024     
*University Lumière Lyon 2, France*<br>
Supervisor: Prof. Julien Jacques


## Awards & Honors

**Marie Skłodowska-Curie Action Seal of Excellence** (Feb. 2026)   
*European Commission* | Score: 91.60 / 100   
<a href="docs\Seal of Excellence.pdf" download class="pub-link" style="margin-left: 0px;">
    <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download Certificate
  </a>
  <br>
  Awarded for the project proposal *ACHIEVE*.
